sqlMap.select: select a.idx as idx, case #v_LANGDATA# when '1' then username when '2' then username2 else username2 end username, case #v_LANGDATA# when '1' then b.description when '2' then b.description2 else b.description2 end description, case #v_LANGDATA# when '1' then departmentname when '2' then departmentname2 else departmentname2 end deptname from tbl_schedule_public_dept a inner join tbl_usermaster b on a.usercn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where a.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# order by a.idx
sqlMap.update: update tbl_holidaylist set isuse = #v_ISUSE# where holidayid = #v_HOLIDAYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#

update tbl_holidaylist set holidayname = #v_HOLIDAYNAME#, holidayname2 = #v_HOLIDAYNAME2#, holidaydate = #v_HOLIDAYDATE#, issolar = #v_ISSOLAR#, isrepeat = #v_ISREPEAT#, isrest = #v_ISREST#, usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# where holidayid = #v_HOLIDAYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_lunaruse set lunaruse = #v_LUNARUSE# where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
update tbl_previoslyregi set previoslyregiuse = #v_REGI# where usecompany = #v_COMPANYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_schedule_public_dept where idx = #v_ID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
delete from tbl_holidaylist where holidayid = #v_HOLIDAYID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
